buildCommand: prisma generate && prisma migrate deploy && next build
comment_crons: Vercel native cron is daily-only on the free Hobby plan, which is too coarse for uptime monitoring. The every-5-minute GitHub Actions workflow (.github/workflows/cron.yml) drives checks on free. On Vercel Pro you can replace it by adding: "crons": [{ "path": "/api/cron", "schedule": "*/5 * * * *" }] — Vercel will auto-send Authorization: Bearer $CRON_SECRET.
